allow: Bash(sed -i 's|use crate::namespaces::lang::{JsValue, RuntimeContext, evaluate_expression, evaluate_statement};|use crate::namespaces::value::JsValue;\\nuse crate::namespaces::lang::{RuntimeContext, evaluate_expression, evaluate_statement};|' src/namespaces/abi.rs)
Bash(sed -i 's|    use crate::namespaces::lang::JsValue;|    use crate::namespaces::value::JsValue;|' src/namespaces/abi.rs)
Bash(target/release/rts.exe -e 'import { io } from "rts"; let n = 0; while \(n < 3\) { io.print\(n\); n = n + 1; }')
Bash(python -c "import subprocess, time; t=time.perf_counter\(\); subprocess.run\(['target/empty_app.exe'], capture_output=True\); print\(f'{\(time.perf_counter\(\)-t\)*1000:.1f}ms'\)")
Bash(rm -f src/cli/eval.rs src/cli/run.rs src/cli/repl.rs src/cli/compile.rs src/cli/test.rs)
Bash(bun -e "const [a, b, c] = [1, 2, 3]; console.log\(a, b, c\)")
Bash(bun -e "function f\({x, y}\) { console.log\(x, y\) } f\({x:1, y:2}\)")
Bash(bun -e "class C{#val=10; #double\(\){return this.#val*2} get\(\){return this.#double\(\)}} console.log\(new C\(\).get\(\)\)")
Bash(bun -e "function* gen\(\){yield 1; yield 2; yield 3} const g=gen\(\); console.log\(g.next\(\).value, g.next\(\).value, g.next\(\).value\)")
Bash(bun -e "const m=new Map\(\); m.set\('a',1\); m.set\('b',2\); console.log\(m.get\('a'\), m.size\)")
Bash(target/debug/rts.exe -e 'import { io } from "rts"; function recurse\(n: i64\): i64 { return recurse\(n + 1\); } try { recurse\(0\); } catch\(e\) { io.print\("caught overflow"\); }')

Bash(RTS_STACK_LIMIT=5 target/debug/rts.exe -e 'import { io } from "rts"; function recurse\(n: i64\): i64 { return recurse\(n + 1\); } try { recurse\(0\); } catch\(e\) { io.print\("caught overflow"\); }')
